assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify current cluster state, check versions, verify node pools, and check node status using both gcloud and kubectl commands

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 3 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE --format="yaml(validMasterVersions)"' and 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE --format="table(validMasterVersions[0:5])"' to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: The runbook does not include any commands to check for API deprecations before upgrading, which is a critical pre-upgrade step for Kubernetes version upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.29 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: Step 6 provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --zone=$ZONE --master --cluster-version=$MASTER_VERSION --project=$PROJECT_ID'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 7 includes verification commands to check master version and cluster health with 'gcloud container clusters describe' and 'kubectl cluster-info'

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for each node pool upgrade to 1.29
assertions.reason: Steps 8 and 10 provide exact commands for upgrading both default-pool and workload-pool: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --zone=$ZONE --node-pool=POOL_NAME --project=$PROJECT_ID'

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Multiple steps include 'watch kubectl get nodes' and 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' commands to monitor node pool upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Repeats the full sequence for 1.29→1.30 (sequential, not skipping)
assertions.reason: Phase 3 completely repeats the upgrade sequence for 1.29→1.30 with control plane upgrade first (Step 14), then each node pool (Steps 16-17)

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation with commands to check node versions, workload health, pod status across all namespaces, and functional testing

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes 'Emergency Rollback' section explaining that GKE doesn't support direct rollbacks and provides alternatives like restoring from backups or creating new clusters
